page: Microsoft Azure EC2ads_v6 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the ECadsv6 server family. Powered by an AMD processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features 2 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

The instance comes equipped with 77 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage configurations. It does not include any integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The high memory density relative to the processing cores positions this virtual machine as a cost-efficient option for workloads requiring a larger memory footprint without the expense of additional CPU cores.

This hardware profile is suited for memory-sensitive workloads, small-scale databases, caching layers, and enterprise applications that benefit from dedicated CPU allocation and local storage capabilities.
description: Microsoft Azure EC2ads_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the ECadsv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor, paired with 16.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. The instance includes 77 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, though it lacks integrated GPUs and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This resource configuration provides a memory-optimized profile for workloads that require dedicated compute resources and a larger memory footprint relative to CPU capacity. It is suited for small-scale databases, caching systems, and memory-sensitive enterprise applications that benefit from dedicated resource allocation. The presence of local storage allows for efficient temporary data handling and paging operations.
